Identity.Name: StingIssueTypes
Identity.Definition: BIM issue / coordination-issue type taxonomy. Maps to STING BimIssue.Type, BCF 2.1 topic types, and Planscape mobile issue dropdown. Covers ISO 19650 coordination workflows + clinical handover use cases.

Governance.StandardsBasis: BCF 2.1 topic types; ISO 19650 coordination workflow; STING BimIssue catalogue

Value.Definition: Request For Information — formal information request from contractor / appointed party to designer.
Technical Query — supplier / sub-contractor technical question, often pre-construction.
Non-Conformance Report — recorded deviation from specification / drawings / standard.
Site Instruction — formal instruction from CA to contractor.
Material Requisition — supplier-facing material order with submittal requirements.
Change Request — proposed scope / cost / programme change.
Clash — clash detection finding requiring resolution.
Observation — informal note, snag, watch-item. Not a contractual instruction.
Action — assigned task arising from a meeting / review.
Comment — review-cycle comment, not requiring formal response.
Snag — defect identified during handover walk; resolution required before sign-off.
